description:
This fully organized wardrobe will save you from the madness of finding the right outfit from piles of clothes in the morning rush. It’s equipped with hanging rails, hooks, and racks and to display your shirts, shoes and bags nicely and neatly for the next day’s work, making you feel refreshed early in the morning. Invite this standing fabric wardrobe to your house to make it spick-and-span.

Features:

 

  • Perfect Closet Organizing System: Dimensions: 66.1x42.1x14.2in.This garment rack is great for creating storage space to organize your clothes and shoes in your laundry room and bedroom. Two hanging rods can hang coats, long dresses, jacket, and other heavy clothes. 4 layers of shelves add extra space to store beddings, shoes, and boxes. Two side hooks are designed for bags and scarfs. Make your room tidy and organized with this rack.

 

  • Heavy Duty Iron Material: Made of coated iron, corrosion-resistant and rustproof. It can also act as an indoor clothesline pole in rainy days. The non-woven fabric is moisture-proof and easier to scrub.

 

  • 360° Rotatable Hooks: 360° rotatable hooks enable you to adjust the angle freely, according to room space and item size, more flexible and convenient.

 

  • Strong Weight Capacity: The weight capacity of the hanging rod and the fabric rack reaches up to 33lbs and 11lbs separately, robust enough to hold heavy clothing, shoes, and beddings.

 

  • Easy To Install: With no other tools required, just follow instructions to finish the installation with your bare hands. Turn a mess into order immediately with this clothing rack.

Specifications:

Product Type: Garment Rack
Color Options:White
Material: Iron +Plastic +Non-woven Fabric
Per Non-woven Fabric Size: 46x36cm/18.1x14.2in
Per Non-woven Fabric Weight Capacity: 5kg/11lbs
Per Hanging Rod Available Length: 46cm/18.1in
Per Hanging Rod Weight Capacity: 15kg/33.1lbs
Item Size (assembled): 168x107x36cm/66.1x42.1x14.2in
Item Weight: 2371g/5.2lbs
Package Size: 53x31x8.5cm/20.87x12.2x3.35in
Package Weight: 2849g/6.28 lbs

Package Contents:

1 x Garment Rack (disassembled)
1 x User Manual
